item.title: Index
item.description: Greetings, traveler 🗿 In this garden, I collect all kinds of gems. Some of them are useful, and some of them aren’t.

item.title: AI tools for designers
item.description: AI will not replace designers; designers will be replaced by those who use AI.

item.title: Color tools
item.description: There are loads of cool tools for designers on the web, and we all have our go-to tools for working with color. Here are my favs.

item.title: Design books
item.description: Some books about designing or related to designing.

item.title: Design courses
item.description: No profession can be mastered in a few months. It’s better to make learning a habit.
